case_title: BRAUM, THOMAS H. VS REGAN, KIMBERLY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,062.30 FILED BY BRAUM, THOMAS H. AS TO DEFENDANT REGAN, KIMBERLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT REGAN, KIMBERLY HEARING SET FOR AUG-17-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRAUM, THOMAS H. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REGAN, KIMBERLY $2,062.30 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,082.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
LETTER FROM KIMBERLY REGAN RECEIVED AND SENT TO LILLIAN SING.
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRAUM, THOMAS H.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRAUM, THOMAS H. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REGAN, KIMBERLY $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,820.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT. RECEIPT TO KIMBERLY REGAN RETURNED SIGNED.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF AUG-17-1993, GRANTED
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRAUM, THOMAS H.
